jobs.title: Experienced Digital Marketing & AI Trainer
jobs.description:
I need a seasoned trainer who can walk my in-house team through the full digital marketing stack, yet place extra emphasis on AI tools and automation. My ideal fit has at least five years of hands-on experience running campaigns across SEO, SMM, SEM, Meta ads, content writing and Canva, but your real strength should be demystifying AI—specifically chatbots and marketing-automation workflows—and showing how they plug into everyday marketing tasks.

jobs.title: Excel Stock Data Reconciliation
jobs.description:
I have several Excel workbooks that track our stock supply quantities. Unfortunately, the running balances have drifted and I keep running into inconsistent data. I need a data-savvy professional to dig into the spreadsheets, locate every mismatch, and return a clean, fully reconciled file.

Here is what I’m after:  
• Work directly in the existing .xlsx files—no data extraction needed.  
• Clean and standardise the key columns (item code, in-qty, out-qty, balance, unit cost, payment status).  
• Identify and flag each row, SKU, or date range where the quantity on hand does not reconcile with
skills: Data AnalysisData CleansingData EngineerData EntryData ManagementData VisualizationExcelVisual Basic

jobs.title: Hindi Female App Tutorial Voice
jobs.description:
I’m preparing a short “how-to” tutorial for my mobile app and need a native-sounding female voice in Hindi to guide users through the steps. The final video will run roughly 6–10 minutes, so I’ll need a script of a similar length first, followed by the recorded voice-over.

The style I’m after is friendly and conversational—think clear, approachable guidance rather than a formal lecture. Once the script is drafted, I’ll review it quickly so you can move straight to recording.

Deliverables:
• Hindi script (6–10 minutes of spoken content)  
• Final, clean audio file in WAV or high-quality MP3
skills: Audio EditingAudio ProductionAudio ServicesHindi TranslatorScript WritingVoice ActingVoice OverVoice Talent

Install WordPress + install the theme + import that demo's data
Replace all branding with ours — logo, site name, and browser tab title (I'll provide everything you need)
